# Tweaker

> Tweaker is a Bun and Vite+ monorepo for React 19 developer-tooling interfaces. It contains the `tweaker` package, a compact Leva-inspired floating configuration panel, and the separate experimental `panel` package, a composable application-owned panel system with built-in inputs and visualizations.

The two packages have distinct APIs and state models; do not treat them as interchangeable. Prefer their documented public entrypoints and import each package's `style.css` export. Source files are authoritative for current behavior, while `dist` directories are generated build output.

## Documentation

- [Project overview](README.md): Usage, control extensions, panels, workspace structure, development commands, and port allocation
- [Tweaker package reference](packages/tweaker/README.md): Preferred `tweaker` API and compatibility notes
- [Panel package reference](packages/panel/README.md): `panel` quick start, state ownership, items, validation, built-in components, themes, exports, and development
- [Repository guide](AGENTS.md): Architecture boundaries, public API constraints, persistence rules, verification requirements, and contributor guidance

## Tweaker Package

- [Public entrypoint](packages/tweaker/src/index.ts): Exported components, hooks, store utilities, and types
- [Public types](packages/tweaker/src/types.ts): Control configuration, schema, state, store, and component contracts
- [React integration](packages/tweaker/src/react): Provider, context hooks, snapshots, and `useTweaker`
- [Panel implementation](packages/tweaker/src/panel): Panel composition, docking, sections, controls, and row ordering
- [Store implementation](packages/tweaker/src/store): Zustand store creation and Zod-validated persistence
- [Website example](apps/website/src/main.tsx): End-to-end consumer example for the `tweaker` package

## Panel Package

- [Public entrypoint](packages/panel/src/index.ts): Consumer components, built-in inputs and visualizations, and public contracts
- [Advanced entrypoint](packages/panel/src/advanced.ts): Low-level store hooks, state types, ordering helpers, theme constants, and normalization utilities
- [Built-in inputs](packages/panel/src/inputs): Package-owned input and visualization components
- [Demo application](apps/demo/src/App.tsx): Integrated examples of public `panel` capabilities
- [Interactive usage guide](apps/demo/src/usage-guide.tsx): Demo-local usage documentation and examples

## Development and Verification

- [Workspace configuration](package.json): Bun workspaces, package catalog, scripts, and the full `bun run ready` verification gate
- [Vite+ configuration](vite.config.ts): Formatting, linting, staged checks, and task configuration
- [Tweaker tests](packages/tweaker/tests): Store, persistence, ordering, and docking behavior tests
- [Panel tests](packages/panel/tests): Store, component, validation, document, and input behavior tests
- [Website end-to-end tests](apps/website/tests/tweaker.spec.ts): Browser coverage for the `tweaker` package
- [Demo end-to-end tests](apps/demo/tests): Browser coverage for built-in and custom `panel` items

## Optional

- [Codex skill](SKILL.md): Compact repository-specific usage guidance for coding agents
